chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Misc.Appln.No.D-14 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.7835/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.7836/2021 (E/ A). 04. For hearing of main case. 22.12.2021 Mr. Abdul Hamid Mazari, Advocate for the applicant. = * = * = * = * = * = The applicant by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application has sought for quashment of FIR Crime No.78/2021, u/s. 341, 353,427,147,148 PPC of P.S Guddu, District Kashmore @ Kandhkot. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the subject FIR being false, has been lodged on behalf of the State with ulterior motive; therefore, it is liable to be quashed. We have considered the above arguments and perused record. If the applicant is having a feeling that he being innocent has been involved in subject FIR falsely, then he may prove his innocence by joining the investigation. No case for quashment of subject FIR is made out. Consequently, the instant Crl.Misc.Application being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E
